name: Violet Odessa Fuller
activities: The Archonian Club of Zeta Phi Beta Sorority 2
bio: Violet Odessa Fuller, known as 'Vi,' from Mebane, N. C., earned her A.B. She participated in the German Club, Le Cercle Francais, the Archonian Club and Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, the Y.W.C.A., and the Hayes Fleming Student Volunteer Society.

name: Robert Louis Garrett
activities: Head of Department of Sex Hygiene, Hi-Y Club, Washington High School 3, 4
Student Representative on Arrangement Committee for N.I.D.A. 3
other: 205 W. Normet St., Gastonia, N. C.; A.B.
bio: Robert Louis Garrett of Gastonia, N. C., earned his A.B. He was active in varsity football, choral and dramatic groups, served as President of his Class for three years and was a member of Omega Psi Phi Fraternity, among many other leadership roles.

name: Lewis Van Dorn Graves
activities: Member of Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity
bio: Lewis Van Dorn Graves, from Jersey City, N. J., earned his A.B. He edited the Sentinel Dormitory Journal, belonged to Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity, and played football while serving as Track Captain.

name: Loree Marion Griffin
activities: Hayes Fleming Volunteer Society Representative of Estey House Organization
bio: Loree Marion Griffin, known as 'Lois,' from Hendersonville, N. C., earned a B.S. After attending Bennett College, she joined Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, the Y.W.C.A., the Science Club, and represented the Hayes Fleming Volunteer Society at Estey House.

name: Julius Anderson Holden
activities: Corresponding Secretary of Phi Beta Sigma Fraternity 3
other: 105 Fuller Street, Smithfield, N. C.; B.S.
bio: Julius Anderson Holden of Smithfield, N. C., earned a B.S. He was active in the Student Credit Union, Y.M.C.A., Phi Beta Sigma Fraternity, the Science Club, and served as Captain of the Varsity Basketball Team.

name: Mary Magdalene Holt
activities: Treasurer of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority 3, 4
other: 314 Bragg Street, Goldsboro, N. C.; A.B.
bio: Mary Magdalene Holt of Goldsboro, N. C., earned her A.B. She was a member of the Pyramid Club, Y.W.C.A., Le Cercle Francis, and the Alpha Omicron Honor Society, and served as Treasurer of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority.

name: Purcell Howell
other: 575 Franklin Avenue, Brooklyn, N. Y.; A.B.
bio: Purcell Howell, from Brooklyn, N. Y., earned his A.B. after first attending Virginia State College. He sang in the University Choir and Double Sextett, and was a member of the German Club and Sociology Club.

name: Valdosia James
bio: Valdosia James, from Burgaw, N. C., earned her A.B.

name: Florence Elizabeth Jones
bio: Florence Elizabeth Jones, called 'Flo,' from Baltimore, Md., earned her A.B. after attending Livingstone College. She belonged to Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, served as Treasurer of Le Cercle Francais, and represented Estey House Organization.

name: Ida Elizabeth Jones
quote: Where there is a will there is a way
other: 427 Smith Street, Raleigh, N. C.; A.B.
bio: Ida Elizabeth Jones of Raleigh, N. C., earned her A.B. She lived by the motto 'Where there is a will there is a way,' and was active in the Y.W.C.A., the Hayes Fleming Student Volunteer Society, and the Brush and Palette Art Club.
